name: Geckoboard Dashboard API
what_it_does: Geckoboard REST API for real-time KPI dashboards and team visibility screens. Enables AI agents to push live data to TV dashboards, create and update datasets, manage dashboard layouts, and integrate business metrics into team visibility displays. Geckoboard specializes in office TV dashboards for customer support and operations teams.
use_cases: Pushing real-time metrics to office TV dashboards from operations monitoring agents
Creating datasets and visualizations from data pipeline agents
Updating team KPI boards from customer support automation agents
Integrating operational metrics into team visibility systems from BI agents
not_for: Complex data exploration and ad-hoc analysis
Private user-facing analytics in consumer applications
best_when: A support, operations, or sales team wants AI agents to push live metrics to shared TV dashboards, keeping the team informed of real-time KPIs without manual updates.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Dashboard data is often displayed in shared office spaces. Metrics pushed may include customer or employee data visible to all present.

auth.notes: Geckoboard uses API key in Basic auth header. Keys are account-scoped. Simple, developer-friendly authentication model.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 30-day free trial; no permanent free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Essential, Pro, and Scale plans based on number of dashboards and users
pricing.notes: UK-based company. No free tier — requires paid plan after trial. Pricing straightforward per dashboard.

performance.rate_limits: Dataset API: 10 requests/second; dashboard API limits per plan

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API with Basic auth (API key)
No webhooks — push-only model (you send data to Geckoboard, no callbacks)
Dataset API supports upsert semantics — idempotent data pushing
Rate limit of 10 req/sec on Dataset API — batch data pushes appropriately
Dashboard layout management is separate from data management
UK company — EU data residency; GDPR-native
agent_readiness.security_notes: API key in Basic auth. GDPR (UK company). Dashboard data may be visible in shared office spaces. No granular scopes.

security_score_components.security_notes: API key Basic auth. GDPR (UK-based). Dashboard data visible in shared spaces — avoid pushing personal data.
